title: The Idiot Boy
content:
He wandered down the moutain grade 
Beyond the speed assigned,
A youth whom Justice often stayed
And generally fined.

He went alone, that none might know
If he could drive or steer.
Now he is in the ditch, and Oh!
The differential gear!
meaning:
Rudyard Kipling's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Idiot Boy"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
